news.text: Lawyers to the wealthy warn that AI legal advice comes with serious risks
From surplus to strain: world rice supply threatened by Iran war, El Nino - Reuters
Stagflation risks stacking up as Iran war enters third month - Reuters
US military commander to brief Trump on new military options against Iran, Axios reports - Reuters
China's factory activity extends expansion, PMI shows, as Iran war risks mount - Reuters
Global oil price retreats after hitting 4-year high on concern of US-Iran war escalation - Reuters

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Mixed pre-market action with tech leading (+0.80%) while defensives get hammered. VIX up 2.44% to 29.02 signals elevated anxiety heading into a massive data dump at 12:30. Energy ripping +2.29% on Iran war escalation fears, but oil prices actually retreated from 4-year highs overnight.

◆ What to Watch

  • PCE Data Avalanche (12:30) - Core PCE MoM/YoY plus GDP and Employment Cost Index all drop simultaneously. Fed's preferred inflation gauge could swing markets hard.
  • Stagflation Narrative - Iran war entering month three with global supply chain disruptions mounting. Rice supplies threatened, Japan factory output falling.
  • Energy Volatility - Oil retreating despite war escalation. Trump military briefing on Iran options could reverse this quickly.
  • China PMI Strength - Factory activity expanding despite regional tensions, supporting tech rally in pre-market.

◆ Sector Rotation

Clear flight to growth and away from rate-sensitive plays. Tech and energy leading while utilities (-1.23%) and materials (-0.86%) getting crushed. This screams stagflation positioning - investors want growth that can handle inflation and energy exposure for supply shock protection.
✦ Bull Case
Tech momentum accelerating with China PMI support. If PCE comes in softer, growth stocks could explode higher on rate cut hopes.
⚠ Bear Case
VIX approaching 30 with small caps down -0.67%. Hot PCE data + war escalation = stagflation reality check and broad selloff.
⚡ Key Driver
12:30 data dump is make-or-break. Core PCE above consensus kills the rally. Below consensus and we gap up hard.

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY 711.58 - Flat pre-market. Break below 705 triggers broader selloff, above 715 and we're running
  • QQQ 661.57 - Leading the charge. 665 resistance becomes launch pad if data cooperates
  • VIX 29.02 - Death cross at 30. Above that level and risk-off accelerates fast
  • XLE Energy - Best sector play but watch for oil price reversal if Iran tensions cool

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
